mission:
Implement tool call tracking for swarm agents.

Read the full spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03

tasks.title: Rewrite _stream_agent_output + switch output format + fix mo
P1: Add tool_calls and mcp_status DB tables
P5: Add tool failure and MCP status visibility to planner co
P6: Add autodev tool-usage CLI command
P7: Integration tests for tool call tracking
P5: Planner visibility - tool failures and MCP status in con
Close duplicate P5/P6 tasks - work already done
Verify all tests pass after P3+P4 wiring

discoveries: [circuit-breaker-impl-v2] (report) Circuit breaker complete. 21 tests pass. Full state machine, per-task tracking, on_trip callback, reset, get_summary. 3260 full suite passed.

[state-verifier] (report) STATE VERIFICATION REPORT -- Circuit breaker: EXISTS (173 lines, 21 tests, NOT wired into controller/planner). Checkpoint/resume: EXISTS (14 tests, IS wired into controller at 3 call sites). Stagnation extensions: EXISTS (319 lines, 30 tests, PARTIALLY wired - planner calls analyze_stagnation but does NOT pass error_messages/task_agent_counts/file_changes). BLOCKER: circuit breaker + stagnation extended params need wiring into controller.py and planner.py.

[wire-circuit-breaker] (report) All wiring complete. Circuit breaker summary exposed in SwarmState, rendered for planner when tripped, and extended stagnation params (error_messages, task_agent_counts, file_changes) forwarded from planner to analyze_stagnation(). All 3266 tests pass, ruff clean, bandit clean.
[state-verifier] (report) FINAL STATE VERIFICATION REPORT. See AD_RESULT for full details.

[state-audit] (report) STATE AUDIT REPORT (2026-03-24)

1. CIRCUIT BREAKER: DONE. 21 unit + 6 integration tests pass. Wired in controller: import, init, spawn gate, success/failure recording, summary in SwarmState. Not in planner directly (correct - planner sees via state render).

2. CHECKPOINT/RESUME: DONE. 14 tests pass. Wired in controller: _write_checkpoint(), from_checkpoint(), update_checkpoint_planner_state(). Atomic writes, config drift, orphan cleanup all tested.

3. STAGNATION EXTENSIONS: DONE. 35 tests pass. Repeated errors, agent churn, cost efficiency, file hotspots, pivots-to-decisions. Planner calls analyze_stagnation with extended params.

4. BUDGET ENFORCEMENT: PARTIAL. Spawn budget in planner (lines 210, 284). Retry budget in controller (line 1777). No BudgetConfig, no cost-cap in main loop, no predictive stagnation.

FULL SUITE: 3266 passed, 1 skipped, 0 failures. No regressions.

[adresult-fix] (report) ROOT CAUSE: committed controller.py line 744 uses output_format="stream-json". With stream-json, AD_RESULT markers are embedded inside JSON string fields where quotes are escaped as \"—the brace-counting parser enters string state and never exits, returning None every time. The working copy fix (output_format="text") by another agent is correct. I added: (1) extract_text_from_stream_json() utility in session.py that extracts plain text from NDJSON events, (2) updated parse_mc_result with stream-json fallback, (3) SwarmConfig.worker_output_format field defaulting to "text", (4) warning in build_claude_cmd when stream-json is used, (5) 14 new tests covering both formats. All 3303 tests pass (1 pre-existing failure in test_swarm_circuit_breaker_integration.py excluded—belongs to circuit-breaker-impl agent).

[state-auditor] (report) STATE AUDIT REPORT (2026-03-24 - FINAL)

SUMMARY: All 5 feature areas have code on disk. 4/5 fully DONE, 1 has minor test bug (not production). Full suite: 3306 passed, 3 failed, 1 skipped. Ruff clean. Bandit clean.

1. CIRCUIT BREAKER: DONE (minor test bug)
- Files: circuit_breaker.py (172 lines), test files (495 lines)
- Tests: 24 pass, 3 FAIL (test mock bug: _agent_outputs vs _agent_final_results)
- Wired: import, init, spawn gate, success/failure recording, SwarmState summary

2. CHECKPOINT/RESUME: DONE
- 15 tests pass. Atomic writes, config drift, orphan cleanup. 3 call sites in controller.

3. STAGNATION EXTENSIONS: DONE
- 36 tests pass. Cost efficiency + file hotspot detectors added. Extended params wired in planner.

4. AD_RESULT FIX: DONE
- 52 tests pass. output_format=text default, stream-json fallback parser, build_claude_cmd warning.

5. BUDGET ENFORCEMENT: DONE
- 31 tests pass. BudgetConfig dataclass, _check_budget, _get_budget_status, spawn blocking, cost-rate awareness, affordable-task estimation.

REMAINING: Fix 3 integration test failures (test mock setup bug, not production code). Commit all work.

[budget-config-impl] (report) BudgetConfig spec fields complete. Added max_agent_spawns=20, enforce=True, is_over_budget(), is_warning() to BudgetConfig dataclass. Added 12 new spec tests (TestIsOverBudget, TestIsWarning, TestEnforceFalseAllowsOverspend, expanded TestBudgetConfigDefaults). Full suite: 3321 passed, 0 failed. Ruff clean, bandit clean.

[ground-truth-verifier] (report) GROUND TRUTH VERIFICATION REPORT (2026-03-24)

UNCOMMITTED FILES (modified): .autodev-swarm-learnings.md, .autodev-swarm-state.json, logs/launchd-stderr.log, logs/swarm-daemon-stderr.log, src/autodev/config.py, src/autodev/session.py, src/autodev/swarm/context.py, src/autodev/swarm/controller.py, src/autodev/swarm/models.py, src/autodev/swarm/planner.py, src/autodev/swarm/stagnation.py, tests/test_session.py, tests/test_swarm_stagnation.py

PYTEST TOTAL: 3321 passed, 0 failed, 1 skipped

RUFF: clean (no output)

VERDICT: ready-to-commit. All 3321 tests pass. Integration tests that previously had 3 mock failures are now fully passing (6/6). Ruff is clean. No blockers.

[final-commit] (report) Commit e6397f5 already contains all src/ and tests/ changes. git diff HEAD -- src/ tests/ is empty. Verification suite passes: 3321 tests, ruff clean, bandit clean. No additional commit needed.
